title: One new in-region hospitalization, two medevacs and seventeen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta April 2-4
summary: On April 2, YKHC reports one new in-region hospitalization, one medevac and eleven new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. One In-Region Hospitalization YKHC reports that one COVID-19 positive individual was admitted into the Yukon-Kuskokwim Delta Regional Hospital. This is the 150th individual hospitalized in-region due to COVID-19. One Mede...

title: Planning Commission Meets April 12. Here’s how to weigh in….
summary: The Planning Commission will hold a Committee of the Whole Meeting prior to the regularly scheduled Planning Commission Meeting on April 12, 2022, at 6:30 P.M. This meeting will be a hybrid meeting held both in person and virtual, and will use the same webinar information as the Regular Planning Com...

title: GVEA Receives Proposal for a 36-Megawatt Power Generation Project with Wind, Solar & Battery Components
summary: GVEA received a request from Delta Junction Renewable Resources, LLC for a proposed 36-megawatt self-certified qualifying facility located in Delta Junction, Alaska.

title: Swell Times in the Cradle of Storms
summary: Surfers explore the waves of Umnak Island in the Aleutian Chain. The post Swell Times in the Cradle of Storms appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
